atomicity.message: Single OSL public-docs rewrite work unit: README restructure, source-grounded architecture refresh, security wording cleanup, findings C29 fold-in, and skill metadata alignment for the same pre-flip documentation bead.

verifier.evidence_ref: Agent Mail 3533 plus refreshed implementer checks after c09dfee

conditions.message: The docs/skill payload is mechanically clean for the configured lint surface, and the prior prompt-list test gap is fixed on current HEAD.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 3533 reproduced the hash in an isolated temp clone, verified exactly the five packet paths, git diff --cached --check passed, jsm validate skill/burpvalve passed, and burpvalve lint --json returned status:not_enforced fatal:false command_count:0.
WhiteGorge refreshed after c09dfee with the same staged hash and ran go test ./..., which passed; no Go or runtime files are part of this staged payload.

conditions.message: Single coherent public-facing documentation rewrite; no duplicated competing implementation narrative in the staged slice.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 3534 reconstructed the slice from /tmp/WhiteGorge-osl-readme-docs-rewrite-content.patch in an isolated temp clone and reproduced staged hash sha256:b027afbbd3866dc39a2b3b07f9f3aba0fce119dd0113b26888196445004c66b8 with exactly five paths.
BrightOwl reported git diff --cached --stat showed 5 files changed, consistent with a consolidation rewrite, and duplicate finding-ID check returned no duplicates.

conditions.message: The rewrite does not pretend the repo is already public-ready and keeps launch gates and not_enforced lint wording honest.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 3534 inspected README and SECURITY staged content and found pre_public_launch status, MIT license, pinned install guidance, not_enforced lint explanation, visibility-flip gating, and PVR activation deferral.

BrightOwl scanned the staged docs for stale private/proprietary/main-ref install claims and found no obsolete private install or proprietary public-surface claims; go install hits were rejection guidance.

conditions.message: The payload changes docs and skill metadata/instructions only; no function or executable behavior requires a paired test.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 3533 verified the reproduced staged path list contains only Markdown docs and skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md.
ScarletMarsh reported no .go, shell script, workflow, test, or runtime source file is part of the reproduced hash.

verifier.evidence_ref: Agent Mail 3534 plus refreshed implementer checks after c09dfee

conditions.message: Relevant docs/skill checks and the refreshed full test suite pass on the current tree.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 3534 reproduced the staged hash, git diff --cached --check passed, jsm validate skill/burpvalve passed, and burpvalve lint --json returned not_enforced/fatal false/command_count 0.

WhiteGorge refreshed after c09dfee with the same staged hash and ran go test ./..., which passed for all Go packages; jsm validate skill/burpvalve and burpvalve lint --json also passed/not_enforced as expected.

conditions.message: The packet supplied hash-bound artifacts and the verifier independently reproduced the hash; the implementer evidence wording about em dashes was corrected before gate reporting.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 3533 verified the prompt packet had 13 condition IDs and reproduced staged hash sha256:b027afbbd3866dc39a2b3b07f9f3aba0fce119dd0113b26888196445004c66b8 from /tmp/WhiteGorge-osl-readme-docs-rewrite-content.patch.

ScarletMarsh found two added em dash headings in docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md and noted this was an evidence-claim correction, not a failing rule; WhiteGorge did not repeat the no-em-dash claim in gate reporting.

conditions.message: The payload stays inside the named README/docs rewrite plus skill metadata/public-distribution surface.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 3534 verified git diff --cached --name-status listed only README.md, SECURITY.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md, and skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md.

BrightOwl inspected the staged diff and found README consolidation, SECURITY disclosure wording, and skill frontmatter metadata only, with no code, workflow, installer, tracker, or unrelated generated artifacts staged.

conditions.message: The reproduced payload is documentation and skill metadata/instructions and does not add destructive commands or bypass guidance.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 3533 reported git diff --cached --numstat showed only text changes across the five packeted files.

ScarletMarsh found no scripts, hooks, binaries, workflows, installer implementation, executable permission surface, rm -rf, reset/checkout cleanup flows, or --no-verify bypass instructions in the staged payload.

conditions.message: The staged payload keeps public-launch metadata and findings-log numbering internally consistent for checked surfaces.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 3533 found skill frontmatter license: MIT and distribution: public, README status/license badges, and SECURITY private reporting URL plus pre-flip activation gate.
ScarletMarsh duplicate-heading check for docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md produced no duplicate IDs and confirmed C29/C30 and next marker C31 alignment.

conditions.message: The SECURITY surface gives a concrete GitHub security URL, avoids false activation claims, and keeps PVR activation bound to the visibility-flip gate.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 3534 inspected staged SECURITY.md and found the GitHub security URL, public-exploit-issue warning, and private reporting activation/working-channel deferral before public visibility.
BrightOwl scanned the staged diff for secrets, destructive commands, or stale private/proprietary install claims and found only documentation/security/license/go-install-rejection additions.

conditions.message: The payload is Markdown documentation and skill metadata text, with no UI layout, screenshots, CSS, image output, or TUI rendering surface.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 3533 verified the reproduced staged path list contains README.md, SECURITY.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md, and skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md only.
ScarletMarsh reported no staged image, stylesheet, template renderer, VHS tape, or terminal UI fixture is present.

conditions.message: The payload is docs-only and does not change runtime code, dependencies, binaries, workflows, network behavior, or performance-sensitive paths.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 3533 verified only documentation and skill metadata/instruction files are in the reproduced hash.
ScarletMarsh reported no go.mod, source package, installer script, CI workflow, benchmark, or binary-size-affecting artifact is in the reproduced hash.

conditions.message: The docs preserve human/owner control over launch and agent authority.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 3534 inspected README and found JSON/robot command guidance, commit evidence requirements, explicit non-replacement of human review, and launch-gate limitations.

BrightOwl inspected skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md and docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md and found the skill keeps human-vs-agent evidence boundaries while C29/C30 reinforce claim and tracker-mutation discipline.
